title: Quran, Sura 99: Az-Zalzala
description: Sura 99 (Az-Zalzala: The Earthquake) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 99 (Az-Zalzala: The Earthquake) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: When the earth is shaken with its final earthquake, and the earth discharges its burdens, and man says: 'What is wrong with it?' — that Day, it will report its news.
